modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: How long does a student on hiatus keep their Coyotes mailbox?

full_description_text: I am a student on hiatus and I want to know how long I can keep my Coyotes mailbox. Also, I am active Military and I am not sure if I can keep my account. Please help me with this question.
